name: Fresh Lemon Sherbet
recipeIngredient: 2 egg whites lightly beaten, mixed with 1/8 tsp salt
Mixing bowl with tray for ice cubes and water
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove zest from lemons using a vegetable peeler.
2. In the electric blender, pulverize zest with 1 cup sugar for 2 minutes.
3. Add 1 1/2 cups water to the blender and pulverize for another 2 minutes.
4. Pour mixture into the saucepan and add remaining sugar and water.
5. Bring to a simmer and swirl pan handle to ensure sugar dissolves completely.
6. Remove from heat, stir in lemon juice and well-chilled water.
7. Whisk in egg whites and refrigerate until set according to machine instructions.
1 Serving:
Scoop sherbet into chilled goblets, pour around with aquavit, and garnish with candied peel if desired.
Special Note:
Candied citrus peel is an attractive edible decoration for sherbets, puddings, and fruit desserts. Store in a covered jar after refrigeration; it will keep for weeks.
